summary: OBS settings sync rework (temp extract, scenes + profiles), keyword modes audit check
changes: OBS settings sync reworked: extract zip to %TEMP%, copy .json scene collections to basic\scenes\, profile folders to basic\profiles\
Settings source changed from script-local folder to settings/02 - obs-settings/ (shared settings directory)
Audit Check 10: keyword modes vs config validModes -- verifies every mode in install-keywords.json maps to a valid mode in the target script config.json
Added validModes arrays to config.json for scripts 16 (PHP), 33 (NPP), 36 (OBS)
Updated spec/36-install-obs/readme.md with detailed sync process and zip contents example
Updated settings/02 - obs-settings/readme.txt with proper documentation
